reason: The final sentence states 'd in Spec(A) iff there exists a representation of A whose commutant has self-adjoint real dimension d + 1.' This is imprecise: the face-commutant correspondence (node 1.1) applies specifically to GNS representations (cyclic representations with a distinguished cyclic vector). Not every representation of A is a GNS representation -- GNS representations are precisely the cyclic ones. The statement should say 'there exists a cyclic representation (equivalently, a GNS representation) of A whose commutant...' to be precise. As stated, one might incorrectly include non-cyclic representations, which would give a different (larger) spectrum.
